title: Collection Index
description: Master index schema for a Dynamic Documentary Engine collection — aggregates all artifacts and collection-level rules

description.description: A short description of what this collection covers
description.example: A collection of archival audio and video artifacts documenting World War II for use in generative documentary film generation

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this collection was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update to this collection

runtime_rules.description: Collection-level rules that govern every film generated from this collection

min_duration_seconds.description: Minimum total runtime for a generated film in seconds

max_duration_seconds.description: Maximum total runtime for a generated film in seconds

opening_artifact_id.description: Artifact ID of the opening A/V — always appears first in every generated film

closing_artifact_id.description: Artifact ID of the closing A/V — always appears last in every generated film

allow_repeat_artifacts.description: Global toggle — whether any artifact can repeat within a single film

save_generated_films.description: Whether generated films are saved as analytical artifacts

artifact_counts.description: Summary count of artifacts by type — auto-generated, do not edit manually

artifacts.description: Summarized index of all artifacts in this collection — full metadata lives in each artifact's individual JSON file

artifact_id.description: Unique identifier matching the individual artifact JSON file
